title: Aureline artifact dependency marker
description: Boundary schema for an artifact_dependency_marker_record. Persisted inside any artifact_class in the closed set (settings_export, profile, workflow_bundle, portable_state_package, recipe, saved_view, migration_packet, support_export, sync_artifact) whenever behavior narrows or portability changes on targets lacking the capability. Surfaces (settings_inspector, import_review_sheet, bundle_detail_page, downgrade_flow, headless_cli_inspect, docs_help_page) read the marker before apply, before downgrade, and during inspect. Marker emits no raw provider tokens, raw policy-bundle bytes, or raw kill-switch material. Adding an enum value to artifact_class, dependency_class, effect_on_import, support_promise, or lifecycle_state is an additive-minor bump of schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking.

record_kind.description: Discriminator. The capabilities crate refuses to decode any other value.

schema_version.description: Integer schema version pinned into the marker. Current value is 1.

shared_contract_ref.description: Shared contract ref consumed by every surface that renders the marker.

marker_id.description: Stable opaque marker id. Unique within the owning artifact.

artifact_class.description: Closed artifact-class vocabulary. Adding a new artifact class is an additive-minor bump.

artifact_ref.description: Opaque ref the marker is attached to.

required_capability_id.description: Capability id the marker depends on. Matches a capability_record.capability_id.

required_lifecycle_state.description: Lifecycle state the producer observed when the marker was minted.

dependency_class.description: Why the artifact carries this dependency. Mirrors the capability record's dependency_class.

support_promise.description: Support promise recorded on the marker. Mirrors the capability record's support_promise.

effect_on_import.description: Closed import-behavior vocabulary. Every variant preserves user-authored data: silent-drop variants are intentionally absent.

summary.description: Reviewer-facing 'what changed' copy surfaces render alongside the dependency chip.

fallback_path.description: Bounded fallback / recover / dismiss path. Surfaces use this for the inline recover affordance.

docs_ref.description: Optional docs / help ref the surface can open for context.

behavior_on_missing.description: Behavior summary + fallback path the surfaces render.

kill_switch_active.description: True when an active kill switch / policy disable narrowed the dependency at mint time. A marker with kill_switch_active=true MUST carry a non-empty behavior_on_missing.fallback_path so the user can dismiss / wait / open the resolution flow.

host_scope.description: Closed list of hosts the dependency is admitted on. Required when dependency_class = host_specific.

docs_ref.description: Optional docs / help ref the surface can open for context.
